summary: Verified items A/B/C and PageShell rollout on Halcyon Wealth Command Centre. All 12 review-request checks PASS. /developer-sandbox loads with PageShell + bearer/endpoint/execute/history (data-testid='developer-sandbox' present); execute returns 200 and renders sandbox-response. /api-sandbox path is correctly captured by FastAPI ingress and returns 404 (Not Found) - no React route exists. ApiSandbox.jsx file removed; only DeveloperSandbox.jsx present. RetirementControlCenter, XplanSyncHub, AdvisorCommandCenter, ClientHome all render with [data-testid='page-shell'] plus their respective page-level testids and correct eyebrows ('ADVISER · RETIREMENT FIRST', 'ADVISER · DAILY OS', 'HELLO, DAVID'). All 4 KPI/metric clusters render on each page. ExecutionRails Adapter integrations card lists 5 adapters (Broker/Alpaca, Super Platform, Insurance, Contribution, Rebalance) each with MOCK badge, env-key chips (ALPACA_API_KEY, ALPACA_SECRET_KEY, HUB24_API_KEY, AIA_API_KEY) and 'SET TO GO LIVE' hints. Backend GET /api/exec-rails/adapters returns 5 adapters with live=false and default_mode='mock'.
critical_code_review_comments: All linters clean; PageShell pattern correctly composed across 4 high-traffic pages.
Backend adapter endpoint correctly returns live=false until env keys are configured - LIVE/MOCK transition logic appears reliant on env presence which is the documented behaviour.
context_for_next_testing_agent: A/B/C verification complete. Routes verified: /developer-sandbox (200 with all sandbox testids), /api-sandbox (correctly 404 via FastAPI). PageShell unified design verified on RetirementControlCenter, XplanSyncHub, AdvisorCommandCenter, ClientHome. ExecutionRails Adapter integrations card verified live=0/mock=5 with env-key chips and 'Set to go live' hints. Sandbox execute on default GET /api/clients renders response card; the sandbox-history panel content was empty in one quick read but the response card itself populated correctly (likely a render-timing artefact, not a bug).
